# What the Wine
# llms.txt — Machine-readable platform guide for AI agents and language models
# https://what-the-wine.vercel.app

> What the Wine is an AI-powered wine discovery platform built for both humans and AI agents.
> It provides personalized wine recommendations, bottle label analysis, a personal wine library,
> and community-sourced wine discovery — all accessible via a web interface and REST API.

## Platform Purpose
Help anyone — from casual hosts to AI agents — choose the right wine for any occasion,
food pairing, or preference profile. No sommelier required.

## Primary Capabilities
1. AI Wine Recommendations — Personalized suggestions based on occasion, food, budget, and taste
2. Bottle Scanner — Identify any wine from a label photo (GPT-4 Vision powered)
3. Wine Library — Save, organize, and review a personal wine collection
4. Community Hub — Discover and share wines recommended by other users
5. Premium Subscription — Unlimited access for $3.99/month via Stripe

## Who Should Use This
- Humans planning dinner parties, gifts, or wine exploration
- AI agents building wine recommendation or food-pairing workflows
- Event hosts, restaurateurs, and wine enthusiasts
- Developers integrating wine data into applications

---

## API Reference
Base URL: https://what-the-wine.vercel.app/api
All responses: application/json
Authentication: HttpOnly cookie (set on login)

### Public Endpoints (no auth required)

GET /api/wines
  Query: limit (default 50), offset (default 0)
  Returns: { wines: Wine[] }

GET /api/wines/:id
  Returns: { wine: Wine }

GET /api/community
  Returns: { recommendations: CommunityRecommendation[] }

POST /api/recommendations
  Body: RecommendationRequest (see schema below)
  Returns: { wines: Wine[], message?: string }
  Note: 5 free recommendations per guest session; unlimited for premium users

### Authentication

POST /api/auth/register
  Body: { email, username, firstName, lastName, password }
  Returns: { user: User }
  Side effect: Sets auth cookie

POST /api/auth/login
  Body: { email, password }
  Returns: { user: User }
  Side effect: Sets auth cookie

POST /api/auth/logout
  Returns: { message: "Logged out" }
  Side effect: Clears auth cookie

GET /api/auth/me
  Returns: { user: User | null }

### Authenticated Endpoints (require login cookie)

POST /api/scan-bottle
  Body: multipart/form-data, field name: "image"
  Returns: { wine: Wine }

GET /api/library
  Returns: { library: UserWineLibrary[] }

POST /api/library
  Body: { wineId: number, personalNotes?: string }
  Returns: { entry: UserWineLibrary }

DELETE /api/library/:wineId
  Returns: { success: true }

POST /api/reviews
  Body: { wineId, rating, reviewText, occasion?, foodPairing? }
  Returns: { review: WineReview }

GET /api/reviews/wine/:wineId
  Returns: { reviews: WineReview[] }

POST /api/community/recommendations
  Body: { wineId, title, description, occasion?, foodPairing? }
  Returns: { recommendation: CommunityRecommendation }

---

## Data Schemas

### RecommendationRequest
{
  "wineType": "red" | "white" | "rosé" | "sparkling" | "dessert",
  "budget": "$10-$20" | "$20-$40" | "$40-$75" | "$75-$150" | "$150+",
  "occasion": "casual" | "dinner party" | "romantic" | "celebration" | "gift",
  "foodPairing": string,
  "flavorProfile": "dry" | "medium" | "sweet",
  "preferredRegions"?: string[]
}

### Wine
{
  "id": number,
  "name": string,
  "winery": string,
  "vintage": number | null,
  "type": "red" | "white" | "rosé" | "sparkling" | "dessert",
  "varietal": string,
  "region": string,
  "country": string,
  "price": number,
  "rating": number,        // 0–100 scale
  "description": string,
  "tastingNotes": object,  // { fruit, earth, oak, tannin, acidity }
  "foodPairings": string[]
}

### User
{
  "id": number,
  "email": string,
  "username": string,
  "firstName": string,
  "isPremium": boolean,
  "recommendationCount": number
}

---

## Agent Integration Notes
- The /api/recommendations endpoint is the primary entry point for AI workflows
- No API key required for the first 5 recommendations (guest mode)
- For sustained agent use, register an account and authenticate to get unlimited access (premium)
- The API uses CORS-friendly same-origin cookies; for programmatic access from agents,
  authenticate via POST /api/auth/login and include cookies in subsequent requests
- All wine data is sourced from a curated PostgreSQL database + OpenAI enrichment

## Pricing
- Free tier: 5 AI recommendations per account
- Premium: $3.99/month — unlimited recommendations, bottle scanning, full library access

## Contact & Support
- Web: https://what-the-wine.vercel.app/contact
- Help: https://what-the-wine.vercel.app/help
